notes: You Rdy for some extra info? This game is a bad port from Nintendo Wii to Windows PCs. In the main directory of the game there is a "Autoexec.lua" file, which should (apparently) recognize whether it is a Windows PC or a Wii environment and depending on that it should load the files that the game needs to act further. I think that's where the error is. I tried several things in there and could manage to change the resolution of the startup-screen but no further. I give up on that, but maybe this info can help a real fan of this game to make it run. I count on you! :] Peace.
title: Hyper Fighters
